meaning: twentyfoot equivalent unit标准箱(系集装箱运量统计单位,以长20 英尺的集装箱为标准)
examples: Maybe you should teU our boss about it.
One TEU equals about 12 register tons or 34 cubic metres.
TEU and FEU both are containers which are used in ocean transportation frequently.
Although permitted under Article 50 of the Treaty on European Union (TEU), no state has ever left the Union.
